name: ExtensionLocation_Contact
title: R5: Official contact details for the location (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Location.contact` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Location.contact` 0..* `ExtendedContactDetail`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Location.contact` 0..* `ExtendedContactDetail`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Location.contact` has a context of Location based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Location`.
Element `Location.contact` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Official contact details for the location (new)
element.comment:
Element `Location.contact` has a context of Location based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Location`.
Element `Location.contact` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
The address/telecom use code 'home' are not to be used. Note that these contacts are not the contact details of people who provide the service (that would be through PractitionerRole), these are official contacts for the Healthcare itself for specific purposes. E.g. Mailing Addresses, Billing Addresses, Contact numbers for Booking or Billing Enquiries, general web address, web address for online bookings etc.

If this is empty (or the type of interest is empty), refer to the organization's contacts.

element.short: DataType slice for a FHIR R5 `ExtendedContactDetail` value
element.definition: Slice to indicate the presence of a R5 `ExtendedContactDetail` in FHIR R4

element.comment:
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.purpose` is part of an existing definition because parent element `ExtendedContactDetail` requires a cross-version extension.
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.purpose` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ExtendedContactDetail` is not mapped.
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.purpose` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
If no purpose is defined, then these contact details may be used for any purpose.

element.comment: If no purpose is defined, then these contact details may be used for any purpose.

binding.description: The purpose for which an extended contact detail should be used.

element.short: R5: Name of an individual to contact (new)
element.comment:
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.name` is part of an existing definition because parent element `ExtendedContactDetail` requires a cross-version extension.
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.name` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ExtendedContactDetail` is not mapped.
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.name` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
If there is no named individual, the telecom/address information is not generally monitored by a specific individual.

element.short: Name of an individual to contact
element.definition: The name of an individual to contact, some types of contact detail are usually blank.
element.comment: If there is no named individual, the telecom/address information is not generally monitored by a specific individual.

element.definition: The contact details application for the purpose defined.

element.comment:
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.address` is part of an existing definition because parent element `ExtendedContactDetail` requires a cross-version extension.
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.address` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ExtendedContactDetail` is not mapped.
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.address` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
More than 1 address would be for different purposes, and thus should be entered as a different entry,.

element.short: R5: This contact detail is handled/monitored by a specific organization (new)
element.comment:
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.organization` is part of an existing definition because parent element `ExtendedContactDetail` requires a cross-version extension.
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.organization` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ExtendedContactDetail` is not mapped.
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.organization` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
element.requirements:
Some specific types of contact information can be an handled by an organization (eg legal council is via a specific firm). Element `ExtendedContactDetail.organization` is part of an existing definition because parent element `ExtendedContactDetail` requires a cross-version extension.
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.organization` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ExtendedContactDetail` is not mapped.
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.organization` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: This contact detail is handled/monitored by a specific organization
element.definition: This contact detail is handled/monitored by a specific organization. If the name is provided in the contact, then it is referring to the named individual within this organization.

element.short: R5: Period that this contact was valid for usage (new)
element.comment:
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.period` is part of an existing definition because parent element `ExtendedContactDetail` requires a cross-version extension.
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.period` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ExtendedContactDetail` is not mapped.
Element `ExtendedContactDetail.period` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
If the details have multiple periods, then enter in a new ExtendedContact with the new period.

element.comment: If the details have multiple periods, then enter in a new ExtendedContact with the new period.
